settings.heading:
Built by pet people,
for pet people.
settings.subtext: We started with one question: why is most of this stuff… boring? Now we answer it daily with tail-waggingly good goodies.

settings.heading:
It started with a
stubborn beagle.
settings.body:
In 2014, our founder's beagle Biscuit refused every treat on the shelf. Faced with a very judgemental 14kg critic, she got to work in her kitchen. One salmon-forward recipe and 10,000 zoomies later, Paws & Co. was born.

A decade on, we're a small team obsessed with making pet products that don't suck — stuff you'd actually be proud to have on your counter, that your pet is even more excited to see.

Everything we sell is vet-approved, cruelty-free, and small-batch. Because your weird little gremlin deserves more than landfill-grade squeakers.

settings.title: Real ingredients
settings.body: If we wouldn't feed it to our own pets, it's not going on our shelf. Real food, identifiable first. No mystery meats, no filler fluff.

settings.title: Tail-tested
settings.body: Every single product goes through our in-house panel of 47 dogs, 23 cats, and 3 very opinionated rabbits before it hits the shop.

settings.title: Better for the planet
settings.body: Compostable packaging, carbon-neutral shipping, and 1% of every sale goes to local shelters. Small steps, big tails.

settings.title: Biscuit says yes
settings.body: First batch of Salmon Crunchies. Founder's kitchen.

settings.title: First shop opens
settings.body: Tiny brick-and-mortar in Portland. Still standing.
